summary: A clip from a local news segment with an ONLY ON banner. It shows an interview in an office where a reporter holds a microphone toward a man in a dark suit standing beside a desk, with framed photographs on the walls. The lower-third reads MULLIN CONCERNED OVER VA LEADERS HANDLING OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIMES.

script.scene: A reporter interviews a man in a dark suit in an office; lower-third reads MULLIN CONCERNED OVER VA LEADERS HANDLING OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIMES.
A close shot of the interviewee speaking in front of framed art.
The wider interview shot returns with the reporter and interviewee by the desk.

notable_text: ONLY ON; MULLIN CONCERNED OVER VA LEADERS HANDLING OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIMES
